Policy / Measure: Non-residential MEPS — Phase 1 (worst cohort to minimum class F)
Expected Energy & GHG Impact: High kWh/m² savings from bottom cohort; early MtCO₂ cuts via electrification/DH + Article-10 PV at roof works.
KPIs (annual): % of cohort achieving threshold; TWh saved; MtCO₂ cut; EPC class uplift distribution; PV capacity installed (MWp); Share with BACS/controls
Indicative Funding / Enablers: AFM (EE/RES lines), PNRR/REPowerEU windows, stated for SMEs/public, EIB frameworks; OSS TA vouchers.
Compliance / Notes: EPC-based compliance; narrow exemptions; QA sampling; penalties per Art. 9(7).

Expected Energy & GHG Impact: Additional TWh savings; deeper GHG reductions; market learning reduces costs.
KPIs (annual): Compliance rate vs deadline; Incremental TWh/MtCO₂; Audit pass rate; Cost per m²/kWh saved
Indicative Funding / Enablers: Continuation of Phase-1 lines; tax allowances; ESCO models; green leases for split incentives.
Compliance / Notes: Refine segmentation; maintain safeguards; publish compliance dashboards.

Expected Energy & GHG Impact: Largest energy poverty relief; significant heat demand cuts; MtCO₂ reductions in gas/biomass areas.
KPIs (annual): Dwellings upgraded (no.); TWh saved & MtCO₂; Vulnerable households assisted (no.); Average bill reduction (RON/yr)
Indicative Funding / Enablers: AFM Social/Heat & Solar Social, HOA lines with guarantees, municipal co-financing; OSS turnkey delivery.
Compliance / Notes: No disproportionate exemptions for rentals; RP (passport) accepted for staged compliance.

Expected Energy & GHG Impact: Further structural savings; comfort and IAQ gains.
KPIs (annual): Compliance rate per tenure; EPC uplift histogram; Health/comfort indicators (IAQ, overheating)
Indicative Funding / Enablers: Scale-up of Stage-1 lines; mortgage-linked incentives; utility on-bill recovery pilots.
Compliance / Notes: Enhanced QA; contractor capacity plans; consumer protections active.

Expected Energy & GHG Impact: Enables timely compliance; reduces last-minute rush.
KPIs (annual): Pre-notices sent (no.); OSS cases opened/closed; Web portal visits; hotline use
Indicative Funding / Enablers: MEPS portal; municipal outreach; cadastre/tax/EPC registry matching; data-sharing protocols.
Compliance / Notes: Transparent notices; multilingual materials; privacy by design.

Expected Energy & GHG Impact: Assures real performance improvement; underpins credible reporting.
KPIs (annual): EPC issuance rate; Audit fail rate; Time-to-compliance
Indicative Funding / Enablers: National EPC registry upgrades; auditor QA budgets; M&V guidance for allowed alternatives.
Compliance / Notes: Alternative evidence restricted to approved sub-sectors; standardized methods only.

Expected Energy & GHG Impact: Accelerates deep packages; de-risks SME/public investments.
KPIs (annual): Aid uptake (RON); €/kWh saved; Private co-finance leverage
Indicative Funding / Enablers: Grants/loans; tax incentives; ESCO; guarantee schemes; Modernization Fund synergies for DH-connected sites.
Compliance / Notes: Tie disbursement to commissioning & EPC; bonus for early/over-compliance.

Expected Energy & GHG Impact: Delivers equitable savings; reduces energy poverty.
KPIs (annual): Households supported (no.); Avg. grant (RON); Energy-burden drop (%)
Indicative Funding / Enablers: Higher aid intensities; pre-financing for HOAs; turnkey for vulnerable; social safeguards.
Compliance / Notes: Condition funding on RP milestones; landlord-tenant fairness clauses.

Expected Energy & GHG Impact: Increases quality and throughput; lowers soft costs.
KPIs (annual): TA cases solved (no.); Time from intent to works; Rework rate (%)
Indicative Funding / Enablers: County OSS network; design/procurement templates; standard contracts; engineering helpdesks.
Compliance / Notes: KPIs tied to grant windows; publish TA SLAs and satisfaction.

KPIs (annual): Green leases signed (no.); Share of rented stock compliant
Indicative Funding / Enablers: Model clauses; regulatory guidance; recognition in compliance audits.
Compliance / Notes: Fair cost-benefit sharing; rent adjustment caps tied to measured gains.

KPIs (annual): Compliance rate by cohort; Penalties issued/collected; Repeat offenders (no.)
Indicative Funding / Enablers: Automated dashboards; audit budgets; legal support to municipalities.
Compliance / Notes: Graduated penalties; right to appeal; publish anonymized stats.

Expected Energy & GHG Impact: Boosts RES share; reduces delivered energy.
KPIs (annual): MWp installed via MEPS triggers; Share of roofs with PV readiness
Indicative Funding / Enablers: AFM PV; fast-track permits; DSO simplified connections; car-park PV canopies.
Compliance / Notes: Use Solar Design Statements; national suitability criteria.

Expected Energy & GHG Impact: GHG intensity falls for connected buildings; system losses down.
KPIs (annual): RES/waste heat share (%); gCO₂/kWh trend; DH losses (%)
Indicative Funding / Enablers: Modernization Fund; geothermal state aid; municipal rehab programs.
Compliance / Notes: Choose Pathway A/B; require substation/return-temp targets.

KPIs (annual): Safeguard cases (no.); Adjusted deadlines (no.); Appeals outcome
Indicative Funding / Enablers: Dedicated grant lines; ombuds; staged plans via passports.
Compliance / Notes: Documented criteria; transparent decisions; periodic review.
